summary: Read the last handoff or summary file before starting new work when resuming after a break
problem: You jump straight into the codebase after a break and make a change that conflicts with a decision made in the previous session
solution: Before writing any code on resumption, read the most recent handoff or session summary. It takes 30 seconds and surfaces blockers, decisions, and context that are no longer in your active memory
root_cause: Human memory degrades over hours and days; the handoff file is the authoritative record of where the session left off, not your recollection
